title: JNU MBA Program Admissions Open for 2026-28: Key Details and Application Process
description: Jawaharlal Nehru University has opened admissions for its MBA program for the academic session 2026-28. Interested candidates can apply online until May 15, 2026. The program, offered by the Atal Bihari Vajpayee School of Management and Entrepreneurship, emphasizes a curriculum designed to meet industry needs. With a successful track record of alumni in prestigious organizations and entrepreneurship, the program aims to equip students with practical management skills. Learn about the application process, fees, and admission criteria in this comprehensive overview.
